title: Credit Cards in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Credit cards work in many Berlin places, but not everywhere.** Hotels, supermarkets, museums, major shops and modern restaurants are usually card-friendly.
**Cash still matters** for small cafes, bakeries, bars, markets, food stalls, late-night kiosks, public toilets and very small purchases.
**Visa and Mastercard are safest.** American Express is less reliable, and some places still mean German Girocard when they say card.
**Apple Pay and Google Pay work where the terminal accepts your underlying card.** They do not help in cash-only places.
**Carry EUR 20 to EUR 50 in small notes and coins** so Berlin stays easy even when a terminal, taxi or small shop says no.
**Sunday is the stress test:** station supermarkets usually handle cards, but bakeries, markets, Spätis and small cafes may still be cash-first.
